title: Slow Simmered Irish Corned Beef Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring tender corned beef, crunchy pickles, and a rich, nutty flavor, perfect for a romantic dinner. This keto-friendly casserole is sure to become a favorite.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, combine the corned beef brisket, diced pickles, cauliflower florets, shredded cheddar cheese, chopped fresh parsley, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Cover the Dutch oven with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until the corned beef is tender and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
Remove the Dutch oven from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Slice the corned beef against the grain and serve it with the surrounding casserole.
Garnish with additional chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
Refrigerate and consume within 1 week — this preparation is not shelf-stable without an approved acid level and canning process.

Refrigerator pickle only: store in the fridge and consume within 1 week. For shelf-stable canning, add at least 2 tablespoons of vinegar (5% acidity) per cup of brine and follow a tested water-bath process.
